title: nassella niduloides
intro: Nassella niduloides, also known as sweet grass or sweet broom grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of nassella niduloides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Nassella niduloides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
